titleStmt.title: SII 18.50: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 50. (B.K. No. 122 of 1932-33.) KAḶḶIHĀḶ, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record, belonging to the reign of Jagadēkamalla Jayasiṁhadēva, is dated in Śaka 956, Bhāva, Vaiśākha s11u. Akshatṛitīyā Sunday. The details correspond to A.D. 1034 April-23; the week day, however, was Tuesday.

It states that, when pergaḍe Mādiṇayya was governing Banavāsi-dēśa and Kaliyamarasa was the nāḻgāmuṇḍa of Bāsavūr Hundred-and-forty, the king made a gift to god Sahadēvēśvara of Ajjaḍi. The gift was made from the royal camp at Poṭṭaḷakeṟe, at the request of Lakshmādēvi, probably his queen. It was made into the hands of Śrīkaṇṭha-bhaṭṭāraka. Chāvuṇḍamayya, son of Sahadēvayya, is stated to be holding the office of gāvuṇḍu (of Ajjaḍi) at that time.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namaḥ śaktiyuktāya śivāya śivalabdhayē gaṇēśāya na
massarvvaśarvvakammaṇasiddhayē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara para
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakulatilakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalla
jayasiṁhadēvara vijayarājyadoḷ tatpādapadmōpajīvi samastarājyabha
ranirūpita mahāmātyapadavīvirājamāna mānōnnata prabhumaṁtrōtsā
haśaktitrayasaṁpannarappa śrī matperggaḍe mādiṇayyapramukha karaṇaṁgaḷ banavāsi
dēśamaṁ duṣṭanigraha visiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ śrīballavarasarggēkāyattadoḷanubhavise
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadoḷirddu . kaṁda . kaliyugasiṁgana besadiṁ malaparanāṭaṁdu paścimā
bdhivaraṁ maṁḍalamaṁ nimirccirdda nirmmaḷayaśanasahāyasiṁhanūrjjitatējaṁ © svasti pageva
ra bhīmaṁ caladaṁkarāma nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmat kaliyammarasaṁ bāsavu
ra nūṟanālvattarkkaṁ nāḻgāvuṁḍu geyya . caladiṁ vṛttidrōhara taleyuṁ lavāḻu se
nijadōrvvalagarvvadiṁ toḍedaṁ saleyarasu maleparaṟiye sama yada cakraṁ [.]
seṭṭigutta sahadēvayyana maga paranārīdūraṁ paradravyadūṣakaṁ sarvva bhūtātmakanappa
cāvuṇḍamayyaṁ gāvuṇḍugeyye . sakavarṣa 956 neya bhāva saṁvatsarada
vaiśākha suddha Akṣatṟitīya Ādityavāradaṁdu śrī mallakṣmādēviyavara binnapadiṁ śrīmajjagadēka
malladēvarajjaḍiya sahadēvēśvaradēvargge poṭṭaḷakeṟeya bīḍinalu śrīkaṇa bhaṭṭārakara hastō
dakammāḍi sarvvanamasyamāgi pūrvvavrittiyā gibiṭṭu koṭṭar . © svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō
harēta vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ dharmmaślōka
Digital edition of SII 18.50 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
